data.name: Header_Subtitle
data.value: Status of the host's push notifier

data.name: Alert_NotConfigured
data.value: Push notifications are not configured. The host registered the NullPushNotifier default — register a real IPushNotifier implementation (web-push / VAPID, native bridge, etc.) to wake recipient devices.

data.name: Description_DomainSpecific
data.value: Compose-and-send UI is domain-specific (payload shape, recipient picker, threading) and belongs in a downstream consumer panel. This base panel only surfaces wiring health.
